faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 yellow jacket removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes thorough inspection to locate all nests, professional-grade treatment to eliminate the colony, nest removal when accessible, and preventative recommendations. Pricing varies based on nest location, size, accessibility, and the number of nests present. Ground nests and easily accessible areas typically fall on the lower end, while wall voids or high-elevation nests may require specialized equipment and fall toward the higher range.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets more aggressive than other stinging insects?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are significantly more aggressive than bees or most wasp species, particularly when defending their nests. Unlike honeybees that die after stinging once, yellow jackets can sting multiple times and will aggressively pursue perceived threats. They're especially dangerous in late summer when colonies contain thousands of workers, making professional removal essential for Nutley properties.

faqs.question: Is yellow jacket removal safe for my Nutley home and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use proven methods and professional-grade products that effectively eliminate yellow jackets while maintaining safety for your family, pets, and property. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during treatment. We recommend residents remain indoors during the removal process and provide specific timeframes for when treated areas are completely safe to access, typically within a few hours.
